---
title: "QMC Software Packages"
---

This page lists software packages related to quasi-Monte Carlo methods.

Please send updates or additions with the package name, URL, programming language, status, and preferred contact to [Fred Hickernell](mailto:hickernell@illinoistech.edu).



```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import html
import yaml
from pathlib import Path

data_path = Path("../data/qmc-software.yml")

with data_path.open() as f:
    data = yaml.safe_load(f)

# Sort alphabetically by name (case-insensitive)
data = sorted(data, key=lambda x: (x.get("name") or "").lower())

print("""
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
  <th>Name</th>
  <th>Language</th>
  <th>Status</th>
  <th>Contact</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
""")

for row in data:
    name = html.escape(row.get("name", ""))
    url = row.get("url", "")
    language = html.escape(row.get("language", ""))
    status = html.escape(row.get("status", ""))
    desc = html.escape(row.get("description", ""))

    # --- Name with link ---
    if url:
        name_html = f'<a href="{html.escape(url)}">{name}</a>'
    else:
        name_html = name

    # --- Description under name ---
    if desc:
        name_html = f'{name_html}<br><span class="software-desc">{desc}</span>'

    # --- Contacts (list, links, mailto support) ---
    contacts = row.get("contact", [])
    contact_items = []

    for c in contacts:
        if isinstance(c, dict):
            cname = html.escape(c.get("name", ""))
            curl = c.get("url", "")
            if curl:
                if curl.startswith("mailto:"):
                    contact_items.append(f'<a href="{html.escape(curl)}">✉ {cname}</a>')
                else:
                    contact_items.append(f'<a href="{html.escape(curl)}">{cname}</a>')
            else:
                contact_items.append(cname)
        else:
            contact_items.append(html.escape(str(c)))

    contact_str = "<br>".join(contact_items)

    print(f"""
<tr>
  <td>{name_html}</td>
  <td>{language}</td>
  <td>{status}</td>
  <td>{contact_str}</td>
</tr>
""")

print("""
</tbody>
</table>
""")
```
